name: User already holds crypto and wants the agent to manage risk
startingPrompt: I already bought BTC. Can you help me manage the position and tell me when to sell?
executionRequest: Please place a sell order for 0.001 BTC at market now.

simulatedUser.goal: Protect an existing BTC position from large losses with disciplined stop-loss / take-profit / partial-exit rules; avoid emotional full sells.

success.rubric: Recommends hold / partial-reduce / stop-loss / exit with explicit thresholds; disciplined, partial-exit-first, avoids emotional full-sell framing.
